footer.tagline: A technical archive for scale modelers — Gunpla, dioramas & more.

category.noWorks: No works in this category yet.

descriptions.Gunpla: Bandai plastic model kits from the Gundam franchise.
descriptions.Military: All military scale models — tanks, warships, submarines, military vehicles, and figures.
descriptions.Car: Scale car models — racing, classic, and street builds.
descriptions.Character_Model: Character and figure models — anime, sci-fi, and fantasy.
descriptions.Diorama: Scene and diorama builds combining models, bases, and environmental storytelling.
descriptions.Aircraft: Scale aircraft models — fighters, bombers, civilian planes, and helicopters.
descriptions.Ship: Scale warships and vessels — battleships, carriers, submarines, and sailboats.
descriptions.Figure: Standalone figures — resin kits, garage kits, and painted character figures.
descriptions.Other: Sci-fi, fantasy, and other builds that don't fit neatly elsewhere.
